label: prompt
ask
peekOfCode:
def ask(q: str):
    trace_id = str(uuid.uuid4())
    #buoc retrieval
    docs = retriever.invoke(q)
    print("QUESTION:", q, end='\n')
    context = "\n".join(
        d.page_content
        for d in docs
    )
    print("CONTEXT:",context,end='\n')
